Home›Services›Threat Intelligence› Threat Hunting
Proactive Defense

Proactive
Threat Hunting

Automated detection will never catch every threat. Our practice conducts hypothesis-driven threat hunting — proactively searching for adversary activity that evades your existing security controls, informed by real intelligence about the threat actors targeting your industry.

Finding What Automation Misses

Threat hunting is the proactive discipline of searching for adversary activity that has not triggered automated detection. Sophisticated threat actors specifically design their operations to evade common detection methods — making proactive hunting essential for organizations facing targeted threats.

Our threat hunting methodology combines intelligence about active threat campaigns with deep knowledge of adversary tradecraft. Each hunt is structured around a specific hypothesis — derived from threat intelligence, vulnerability analysis, or anomalous environmental indicators — and executed using a combination of endpoint telemetry, network data, and cloud audit logs.

Capabilities

  • Hypothesis-driven threat hunting campaigns
  • MITRE ATT&CK-aligned hunting methodology
  • Endpoint telemetry analysis across EDR platforms
  • Network traffic analysis for C2 and exfiltration indicators
  • Cloud audit log hunting across AWS, Azure, and GCP
  • Living-off-the-land technique detection
  • Persistence mechanism identification and documentation
  • Lateral movement path analysis
  • Hunt finding reports with detection rule recommendations

Who We Serve

Organizations in industries targeted by nation-state or advanced criminal groups. Security teams seeking to validate the effectiveness of their detection controls. Companies that want to proactively discover threats rather than waiting for automated alerts. Enterprises with mature security operations programs seeking advanced capabilities.

Hunting Focus Areas

  • Initial Access Techniques
  • Persistence Mechanisms
  • Lateral Movement
  • Credential Access
  • Data Exfiltration
  • Command & Control

Proactively assess your environment for adversary presence.
